sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35680" key="e(ni/guios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑνίγυιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35680.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">joined in one body,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ibyc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n35680.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lame of one foot,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑνίγυος</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
